name: ShCh-322
events: 10 Dec 1939 ShCh-322 torpedoed and sank the German merchant Reinbeck (2804 GRT) south-west of Helsinki, Finland in position 59°42'N, 24°26'E.
12 Dec 1939 While on patrol near Hang?, Finland, ShCh-322 damaged the German merchant Helga B?ge (2181 GRT) with gunfire.
16 Dec 1939 While on patrol near Hang?, Finland, ShCh-322 damaged the German merchant Gilhausen (4339 GRT) with gunfire.
